channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The enterprise risk nobody is modeling: AI is replacing the very experts it needs to learn from
item.description: For AI systems to keep improving in knowledge work, they need either a reliable mechanism for autonomous self-improvement or human evaluators capable of catching errors and generating high-quality feedback. The industry has invested enormously in the first. It's giving almost no thought to what's happening to the second.I’d argue that we need to treat the human evaluation problem with just as much rigor and investment as we put into building the model capabilities themselves. New grad hiring at major tech companies has dropped by half since 2019. Document review, first-pass research, data clea...

item.title: What to read this weekend: Celestial Lights and If Destruction Be Our Lot
item.description: Here's what we read (and liked) this week.

item.title: I tested the LG B6 and LG B5 OLED TVs side by side — and it was a mess that's mostly just given me a fresh appreciation for the LG C6
item.description: The LG B6 had a lot to live up to as the B5 was one of my top OLED TVs of 2025. Putting them side by side didn't go as I expected…

item.title: This US start-up wants to pay you to host a data center on the side of your home — and says it won't disturb you at all
item.description: SPAN plans installing residential AI computing nodes outside homes, offering subsidized electricity and internet access to participating homeowners.

item.title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
item.description: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

item.title: How to watch Preakness Stakes 2026: live stream horse racing online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how you can watch Preakness Stakes 2026 live streams online and from anywhere in the world, as Laurel Park hosts the The Run for the Black-Eyed Susans.
